programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Garcelle is in the hot seat when a distraught Erika leaves the trip early, but she refuses to roast alone. On their last day in the desert, the women wake up to a stunning exposé that leaves Kyle, Lisa and Dorit with questions. Meanwhile, Sutton calls an emergency meeting among the group - but not everyone makes the guest list.

programs.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programs.desc: Josh Altman has baby on the brain. Josh Flagg is ready to waltz down the aisle. James has unresolved issues with Madison over a huge listing. A new realtor proves she's not to be messed with.

programs.title: Shark Tank
programs.desc: A solution to a problem for swimmers; a tool to help cat lovers find their perfect match; a product designed to encourage children to wash their hands.

programs.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programs.sub_title: The Kelly Clarkson Show S7 Ep128
